text: Varanasi Lok Sabha constituency in Uttar Pradesh. Current MP: Narendra Modi (BJP). Modi won in 2014, 2019, and 2024.
Rae Bareli Lok Sabha constituency in UP. Current MP: Rahul Gandhi (INC). Previously held by Sonia Gandhi from 2004-2024.
Gandhinagar Lok Sabha constituency in Gujarat. Current MP: Amit Shah (BJP). Previously held by L.K. Advani.
Lucknow Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Rajnath Singh (BJP). Previously held by Atal Bihari Vajpayee.
Wayanad Lok Sabha constituency in Kerala. Current MP: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra (INC). Rahul Gandhi won here in 2019 but vacated in 2024.
Amethi Lok Sabha constituency in UP. Current MP: K.L. Sharma (INC). Was a Gandhi family bastion. Rahul Gandhi lost here in 2019 to Smriti Irani.
Hyderabad Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Asaduddin Owaisi (AIMIM). Owaisi family bastion since 1984.
Thiruvananthapuram Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Shashi Tharoor (INC). Tharoor has held this seat since 2009.
Nagpur Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Nitin Gadkari (BJP). Nagpur is also the headquarters of RSS.
Baramati Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Supriya Sule (NCP-SP). A Pawar family bastion in Maharashtra.
Mathura Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Hema Malini (BJP). Holy city of Lord Krishna.
Mandi Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Kangana Ranaut (BJP). Won in 2024 as a first-time candidate.
Mainpuri Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Dimple Yadav (SP). Was previously held by Mulayam Singh Yadav.
Kannauj Lok Sabha constituency. Current MP: Akhilesh Yadav (SP). Former CM of UP represents this seat.
Gorakhpur assembly constituency. Current representative: Yogi Adityanath (BJP), Chief Minister of UP. Was MP from Gorakhpur for 5 terms before becoming CM.
